seo.title: Stripe vs LemonSqueezy vs Clerk
seo.description: A practical comparison of Stripe, LemonSqueezy, and Clerk for SaaS Applications.

content.intro: Comparing billing providers for SaaS developers requires evaluating integration complexity, cost structure, and scalability. Stripe and LemonSqueezy are primary options for subscription management, with trade-offs in implementation effort, lock-in risk, and compliance support.

options.name: Stripe
options.tagline: Comprehensive payment infrastructure with global support
options.best_for: SaaS with complex billing needs, multi-currency requirements, or global expansion

options.name: LemonSqueezy
options.best_for: Early-stage SaaS with minimal billing complexity or rapid prototyping

criteria.name: Integration Complexity
criteria.description: Effort required to implement billing logic into existing systems

criteria.name: Cost Profile
criteria.description: Fee structure for transaction processing and account management

values.LemonSqueezy: 5% flat fee on recurring revenue (no setup costs)

criteria.name: Scalability
criteria.description: Ability to handle high-volume transactions and global compliance

values.LemonSqueezy: Moderate (limited to 30+ currencies, basic payment methods)

criteria.name: Multi-Tenancy Support
criteria.description: Built-in features for managing separate customer environments

values.Stripe: Moderate (requires custom logic for tenant isolation)
values.LemonSqueezy: Limited (no native multi-tenancy, basic team management)

criteria.name: API Flexibility
criteria.description: Customization options for billing workflows and reporting

values.Stripe: High (extensive API with webhooks, custom dashboards)

criteria.name: Lock-in Risk
criteria.description: Ease of migrating to alternative billing platforms

criteria.name: Compliance Features
criteria.description: Built-in tools for GDPR, tax reporting, and data privacy

values.LemonSqueezy: Moderate (manual tax configurations, basic compliance templates)

criteria.name: Revenue Reporting
criteria.description: Accuracy and granularity of financial insights

verdict.summary: Stripe offers superior scalability and compliance but requires more implementation effort. LemonSqueezy prioritizes simplicity and lower costs, making it ideal for early-stage SaaS with basic billing needs.

use_cases.scenario: Building a global SaaS with multi-currency support
use_cases.reason: Stripe's extensive currency and payment method coverage reduces customization effort

use_cases.scenario: Rapidly prototyping a freemium SaaS with fixed pricing
use_cases.reason: LemonSqueezy's low cost and simple setup align with minimal billing complexity

use_cases.scenario: Managing EU-based customers with strict GDPR requirements
use_cases.reason: Stripe's built-in compliance tools and data residency options reduce legal risk
